params.SpellDescription: Add one mana of any color.

remaining_params.SpellDescription: Add one mana of any color.

params.TriggerDescription: At the beginning of your upkeep, put a night counter on CARDNAME. Then if it has eight or more night counters on it, remove all of them and create eight colorless snow artifact tokens named Replicated Ring with "{T}: Add one mana of any color."
